'''鈭歞h-zh-p''' ('''dhazhapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jetty|jetty]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jetty|jetty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-zh-p
|-
! Lemma
| dhazhapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhazhapithi|dhazhapithi]] || [[word:dhazhapiji|dhazhapiji]] || [[word:dhazhapishi|dhazhapishi]] || [[word:dhazhapi|dhazhapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhaputhuth|dhazhaputhuth]] || [[word:dhazhapujuj|dhazhapujuj]] || [[word:dhazhapushush|dhazhapushush]] || [[word:dhazhap|dhazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhaputhu|dhazhaputhu]] || [[word:dhazhapuju|dhazhapuju]] || [[word:dhazhapushu|dhazhapushu]] || [[word:dhazhapu|dhazhapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhapufuth|dhazhapufuth]] || [[word:dhazhapufuj|dhazhapufuj]] || [[word:dhazhapufush|dhazhapufush]] || [[word:dhazhapuf|dhazhapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhazhapethe|dhazhapethe]] || [[word:dhazhapeje|dhazhapeje]] || [[word:dhazhapeshe|dhazhapeshe]] || [[word:dhazhape|dhazhape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhapothoth|dhazhapothoth]] || [[word:dhazhapojoj|dhazhapojoj]] || [[word:dhazhaposhosh|dhazhaposhosh]] || [[word:dhazhap|dhazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhapotho|dhazhapotho]] || [[word:dhazhapojo|dhazhapojo]] || [[word:dhazhaposho|dhazhaposho]] || [[word:dhazhapo|dhazhapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhapofoth|dhazhapofoth]] || [[word:dhazhapofoj|dhazhapofoj]] || [[word:dhazhapofosh|dhazhapofosh]] || [[word:dhazhapof|dhazhapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhazhap忙th忙|dhazhap忙th忙]] || [[word:dhazhap忙j忙|dhazhap忙j忙]] || [[word:dhazhap忙sh忙|dhazhap忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhazhap忙|dhazhap忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhapathath|dhazhapathath]] || [[word:dhazhapajaj|dhazhapajaj]] || [[word:dhazhapashash|dhazhapashash]] || [[word:dhazhap|dhazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhapatha|dhazhapatha]] || [[word:dhazhapaja|dhazhapaja]] || [[word:dhazhapasha|dhazhapasha]] || [[word:dhazhapa|dhazhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhapafath|dhazhapafath]] || [[word:dhazhapafaj|dhazhapafaj]] || [[word:dhazhapafash|dhazhapafash]] || [[word:dhazhapaf|dhazhapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhazhapasha|dhazhapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhazhapasha|godhazhapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhazhapasha|gokidhazhapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhazhapn眉sha|dhazhapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhazhapnkn眉sha|godhazhapnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhazhapn眉sha|gokidhazhapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhazhapsh毛sha|dhazhapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhazhapnksh毛sha|godhazhapnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhazhapsh毛sha|gokidhazhapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhazhaprosha|dhazhaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhazhapnkrosha|godhazhapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhazhaprosha|gokidhazhaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhapmusha|dhazhapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhazhapnkmusha|godhazhapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazhapmusha|gokidhazhapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhazhapsherasha|dhazhapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhazhapnksherasha|godhazhapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhazhapsherasha|gokidhazhapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhazhapngasha|dhazhapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhazhapnkngasha|godhazhapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhazhapngasha|gokidhazhapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhazhapyasha|dhazhapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhazhapnkyasha|godhazhapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhazhapyasha|gokidhazhapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhazhapyamasha|dhazhapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhazhapnkyamasha|godhazhapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhazhapyamasha|gokidhazhapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhazhapn眉sh毛sha|dhazhapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhazhapnkn眉sh毛sha|godhazhapnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhazhapn眉sh毛sha|gokidhazhapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhazhapn眉rosha|dhazhapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhazhapnkn眉rosha|godhazhapnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhazhapn眉rosha|gokidhazhapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhapn眉musha|dhazhapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhazhapnkn眉musha|godhazhapnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazhapn眉musha|gokidhazhapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhazhapsh毛n眉sha|dhazhapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhazhapnksh毛n眉sha|godhazhapnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhazhapsh毛n眉sha|gokidhazhapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhazhapsh毛rosha|dhazhapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhazhapnksh毛rosha|godhazhapnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhazhapsh毛rosha|gokidhazhapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhapsh毛musha|dhazhapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhazhapnksh毛musha|godhazhapnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazhapsh毛musha|gokidhazhapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhazhapron眉sha|dhazhapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhazhapnkron眉sha|godhazhapnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhazhapron眉sha|gokidhazhapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhazhaprosh毛sha|dhazhaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhazhapnkrosh毛sha|godhazhapnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhazhaprosh毛sha|gokidhazhaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhapromusha|dhazhapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhazhapnkromusha|godhazhapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazhapromusha|gokidhazhapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhazhapmun眉sha|dhazhapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhazhapnkmun眉sha|godhazhapnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhazhapmun眉sha|gokidhazhapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhazhapmush毛sha|dhazhapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhazhapnkmush毛sha|godhazhapnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhazhapmush毛sha|gokidhazhapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhazhapmurosha|dhazhapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhazhapnkmurosha|godhazhapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhazhapmurosha|gokidhazhapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhazhap|dhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙zh忙p|dh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhazhap|hodhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙zh忙p|hodh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhazhap|hohodhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙zh忙p|hohodh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhazhap|n眉dhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙zh忙p|n眉dh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhazhap|n眉n眉dhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙zh忙p|n眉n眉dh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhazhap|n茂dhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙zh忙p|n茂dh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhazhap|n茂n茂dhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙zh忙p|n茂n茂dh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhazhap|ludhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙zh忙p|ludh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhazhap|luludhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙zh忙p|luludh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhazhap|lidhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙zh忙p|lidh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhazhap|lilidhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙zh忙p|lilidh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhazhap|kodhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙zh忙p|kodh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhazhap|kokodhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙zh忙p|kokodh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhazhap|kedhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙zh忙p|kedh忙zh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhazhap|kekedhazhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙zh忙p|kekedh忙zh忙p]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
